RuleSet.Name: src/schemaprotobj/IProtObj.java
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch IsProtected yes reallyFileIProtObjJava default empty$

GenFile.Name: reallyFileIProtObjJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$protobj

RuleSet.GenRule: $switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjGetClassCode$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjRealise$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjForget$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjRead$$switch ThisHasChain yes declIProtObjMoveUp default empty$$switch ThisHasChain yes declIProtObjMoveDown default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjBeginEdit$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjEndEdit$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjEditAccessors$$declIProtObjEditAsAccessors$$declIProtObjTableAccessors$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declIProtObjSchemaAccessors default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declIProtObjRecAccessors default empty$$declIProtObjTableRecAccessors$$switch HasDefSchemaOrSuper no declIProtObjPKeyAccessors default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no declIProtObjIsNewAccessors default empty$$iterate Relation( each declIProtObjRelationAccessors empty empty )$$iterate Columns( each declIProtObjColumnAccessors empty empty )$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjCopyPKeyToRec$$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declIProtObjCopyRecToPKey$$iterate ServerMethods( each declProtJavaObjServerMethod empty empty )$$JavaObjInterface$
extends I$reference SchemaDef SchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj$poptop Table switch HasSuperClassRelation yes alsoIProtObjInheritSuperClass default empty$
, I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable SchemaName$Prot$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$Obj
, I$reference SchemaDef SchemaName$Prot$TableName$Obj
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes declIProtObjInheritSuperClass default MaybeExtendProtICFLibAnyObj$
extends I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$Obj
$switch IsInstanceMethod yes declProtJavaObjInstServerProc default empty$
boolean $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declServerMethodParamNoComma each declServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
$switch IsInstanceMethod yes declProtJavaObjInstServerObjFunc default empty$
I$DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$Obj $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declServerMethodParamNoComma each declServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
$switch IsInstanceMethod yes declProtJavaObjInstServerListFunc default empty$
List<I$DefSchemaName$Prot$reference RetTable Name$Obj> $leadlower Name$($iterate Params( first declServerMethodParamNoComma each declServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );

/** * Initially, the class code for an object is I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$.CLASS_CODE, but the Obj layer relies on class code translation to map those * backing store entities to a runtime set of front-facing classcodes that the clients download and use when talking to the server implementing this code base. * * @return The runtime class code used by this object. Only after the system is fully booted are these values stable and reliable. */ int getClassCode();$switch HasAuditColumns yes declIProtObjGetAuditColumns default empty$
import server.markhome.mcf.v3_1.cfcore.MssCF.*;
$ExtendProtICFLibAnyObj$
extends ICFLibAnyObj

/** * Is this a new instance? * * @return True if this is a new instance, otherwise false if it has * been read, locked, or created. */ boolean getIsNew(); /** * Indicate whether this is a new instance. *

* This method should only be used by implementation internals. * * @param True if this is a new instance, otherwise false. */ void setIsNew( boolean value );

/** * Get the I$DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schema cache which manages this instance. * * @return I$DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schema cache which manages this instance. */ I$DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj getSchema();
/** * Set the I$DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schema cache which manages this instance. * Should only be used to install overloads of the buff implementation wired specifically to a transport implementation * that eventually hits a server running a JPA backend. * * @param schema I$DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schema cache which manages this instance. */ void setSchema(I$DefSchemaName$ProtSchemaObj schema);
$switch IsProtected yes reallyDeclIProtObjRelationAccessors default empty$
$switch RelationToIndexIsUnique yes maybeDeclIProtObjRelationSingletonAccessors default maybeDeclIProtObjRelationCollectionAccessors$
$switch RelationTypeTag Superclass empty default declIProtObjRelationSingletonAccessors$
$switch RelationTypeTag Superclass empty default declIProtObjRelationCollectionAccessors$
$switch InSuperiorRelation yes declIProtObjColumnGetter default declIProtObjColumnGetter$
$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIProtObjColumnBasePKeyGetter default declIProtObjColumnBaseDataGetter$

$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIProtObjColumnBasePKeyGetter default declIProtObjColumnBaseDataGetter$$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIProtObjColumnBasePKeySetter default declIProtObjColumnBaseDataSetter$
$switch InSuperiorRelation yes declIProtObjColumnGetter default declIProtObjColumnGetter$
$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIProtObjColumnBasePKeyGetter default declIProtObjColumnBaseDataGetter$

$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIProtObjColumnBasePKeyGetter default declIProtObjColumnBaseDataGetter$$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes declIProtObjColumnBasePKeySetter default declIProtObjColumnBaseDataSetter$

/** * Get the primary key of this instance. * * @return $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ primary key for this instance. */ $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ getPKey(); /** * Set the primary key of this instance. *

* This method should only be invoked by implementation internals. * * @param $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ primary key value for this instance. */ void setPKey( $IProtCompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ value );

/** * create() may return a different instance than the * one used to invoke the operation. All future references * should be to the returned instance, not the original * invoker. You should lose all references to the original * invoker. * * @return I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Prot$reference BaseClass TableName$Obj the reference to the created and realised instance. */ I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Prot$reference BaseClass TableName$Obj create();

/** * Get the I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ instance which currently backs this instance. *

* This value will change for read-only instances, so you should * not hold on to the value as a reference anywhere outside the current call stack. * * @return I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ instance which currently backs this object. */ I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ get$TableName$Rec();
